description: Database operations manager with queuing and auto-persistence

constructor.description: Initialize database manager with auto-persistence interval

methods.onModelStructureReady: Load initial data when model structure is ready
methods.buildObject: Build data object from type and properties
methods.startAutoPersist: Start automatic queue processing at intervals
methods.addTaskToQueue: Add task to queue with promise callback
methods.queueTask: Queue task with processing function and logging
methods.readAll: Read all records of a type
methods.read: Read single record by ID or type
methods.queueUpdate: Queue update operation with overlap handling
methods.processTask: Process single task with error handling
methods.processQueueItems: Process all items in a queue sequentially
methods.processQueues: Process all queues in order (create, read, update, delete)

apiClients.IafApiClientMarkup: API client for markup data operations
apiClients.IafApiClientModelComposition: API client for model composition data
apiClients.IafApiClientGis: API client for GIS data operations
apiClients.IafApiClientOperationalCache: API client for operational cache data
